content:
Masterpieces are speaking for themselves. Intricate inaugural posts are tiresome.  Thus, I have two factors perfectly intertwining for just displaying a crumb of mathematical beauty:
$$e^{i\pi} + 1 = 0.$$
Further Reading:  Kahn Academy’s lecture on Euler’s formula & Euler’s identity.  One could argue that the above wonder is an old trick. Not that impressive anymore. For further astonishment, I’m just going to leave here an xkcd candy:
#xkcd: Equations pic.twitter.com/nFBdGvtLNg
— xkcd (@xkcd2) August 17, 2018
